VM Entry Points
├── entry app:com.example.Demo.main(java.lang.String[]):void id=100, parsing reason:  manually registered

│   │   └── directly calls app:com.example.Greeter.whisper():java.lang.String id=105 @bci=3

│       ├── directly calls app:com.example.Greeter.greet():java.lang.String id-ref=102 @bci=1
│       └── directly calls null:java.lang.String.toUpperCase():java.lang.String id=104 @bci=4
